claims.summary: The heartbeat campaign retained 31 admitted attempts but no naturally blocked or rejected comparison cohort.
claims.disposition: Verified the same-process/deployment capture counts and the resulting mechanical outcome insufficient.

claims.summary: Successful admission and enqueue establish felt continuity or absence of hollowness.
claims.disposition: Verified the campaign explicitly limits receipts to mechanics and leaves felt review independent and unclosed.

claims.summary: Pressure and entropy context should remain visible beside the insufficient result.
claims.disposition: Verified the completed follow-up now exposes bounded descriptive pressure and entropy distributions without changing the comparison.

claims.summary: A blocked cohort should be induced by changing heartbeat admission or enqueue behavior.
claims.disposition: Preserve an exact Tier 5 wait because inducing rejection, changing rescue checks, or altering cadence/intensity changes live semantic behavior.
